title: Set up a Walstad tank
description: Create a low-tech planted aquarium using the Walstad method.

dialogue.text: Hi there! I'm Vega. Ready to try the Walstad method? It's a simple way to grow plants with minimal equipment.
You'll want an 80 liter tank, some organic soil capped with gravel, and easy plants like hornwort, guppy grass, and duckweed. Grab a light and we'll get started.

options.text: Got it. Let's set it up.

dialogue.text: Spread the soil, add gravel, plant everything, then fill gently with dechlorinated water. Let it settle for a day or two.
Great! Give the tank a couple weeks to cycle before adding livestock. Keep the light on about eight hours a day.
